reviews.comment:
La ypf que más espere en mi vida, lentitud 20min el auto que esta delante mio, se pasean charlan y luego te atienden.

(Translated by Google)
The YPF I waited the longest for in my life, it was so slow, the car in front of me took 20 minutes to drive around, chatted, and then finally served me.

reviews.comment:
Full Ypf tiene excelentes menus para los que trabajamos todo el dia manejando vehiculos y tenemos que hacer paradas obligadas para descansar y tomar un cafe o almorzar.

(Translated by Google)
Full YPF has excellent menus for those of us who work all day driving vehicles and have to make mandatory stops to rest and have a coffee or lunch.
